description: REST API and MCP server for social media scheduling to Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, Threads, TikTok, YouTube, Facebook, Bluesky, Mastodon, Telegram
rules: PostPost REST API base URL is https://api.postpost.dev/api/v1
Authentication uses x-api-key header with API key
MCP server is at mcp.postpost.dev with type http not url
scheduledTime must be ISO 8601 UTC format
Media uploads use pre-signed S3 URLs via get-upload-url
